name: URL Metadata Extractor
description: Extracts title, description, and favicon from any public URL by reading its HTML head. Useful for link previews, content enrichment, and web scraping pipelines.

skills.name: Extract URL Metadata
skills.description: Fetches a URL and extracts its Open Graph title, meta description, and favicon. Only reads the first 64KB of HTML — fast and lightweight. HTTPS and HTTP URLs only.

url.description: The URL to extract metadata from. Must be publicly accessible.

title.description: Page title (og:title preferred, falls back to <title>)

description.description: Page description (og:description preferred, falls back to meta description)

favicon.description: Absolute URL to the site favicon

expectedOutput.title: GitHub: Let's build from here
expectedOutput.description: GitHub is where over 100 million developers shape the future of software, together.
